## reference · multi-tenant saas architecture centralization shared services
* A multitenant solution is a solution used by multiple customers, or _tenants_.
* Tenants are distinct from users, with multiple users from a single organization forming a single tenant.
* Multitenant applications include business-to-business (B2B) and software-as-a-service (SaaS) solutions.
* Key considerations for multitenant applications include security, scalability, and isolation between tenants.
* Azure provides various services and guidance for building multitenant solutions, including the Cloud Adoption Framework and Well-Architected Framework.
* A multitenancy checklist is available to help ensure best practices are followed.
* Related resources include the Azure Architecture Center and Azure documentation on multitenant applications.
Sources: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/architecture/guide/multitenant/overview
